Operation 'createTask' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal. Added details about: what inputs are expected (CreateTaskRequest schema), what is returned (task ID via CreateTaskResponse), and side effects (task queued for processing). This helps AI agents understand the full lifecycle and how to use the returned task ID with getTaskResult.

data.current_description: Creates a new captcha solving task.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new captcha solving task and queues it for solving. Accepts task configuration via CreateTaskRequest including captcha type, website URL, and other parameters. Returns a CreateTaskResponse containing the task ID for result polling. The task is immediately added to the solving queue and will be processed by available workers.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Added details about: what inputs are expected (CreateTaskRequest schema), what is returned (task ID via CreateTaskResponse), and side effects (task queued for processing). This helps AI agents understand the full lifecycle and how to use the returned task ID with getTaskResult.

Description lacks critical details: requires task ID input, explains possible status values, indicates polling behavior. Added context about the relationship to createTask and how to use the response for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieves the result of a previously created task.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve captcha solution result for task
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the solution result for a previously created captcha solving task. Requires the task ID from createTask operation. Returns TaskResultResponse containing the solution status (pending, ready, or failed) and the captcha solution if available. Can be polled repeatedly until task completion.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks critical details: requires task ID input, explains possible status values, indicates polling behavior. Added context about the relationship to createTask and how to use the response for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns statistics about the solving queue (waiting time, workers, etc.).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves real-time statistics about the captcha solving queue including average waiting time, number of active workers, queue depth, and processing rates. Useful for monitoring service capacity and estimating task completion times. Returns queue metrics that can inform task submission decisions.

data.current_description: Returns statistics for the specified application (softId).

Useful for monitoring application-specific performance and billing.

data.current_description: Transfer funds from your account to another Anti-Captcha account.
data.description_suggestion: Transfers funds from your account to another Anti-Captcha account. Requires recipient account identifier and transfer amount in request. Deducts funds from source account and credits destination account immediately. Returns confirmation with transaction ID and updated balance. Transfers are irreversible.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details for safe operation. Added: required inputs (recipient identifier, amount), side effects (immediate deduction and credit), return value (transaction ID, updated balance), and important caveat (irreversible).
